name: Scalloped Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the potatoes and cook in boiling salted water until half done. Remove from the water, peel the skins off, and slice or cube.
2. Grease a shallow baking dish. Arrange a layer of potatoes in the dish, sprinkle with some flour and salt, and dot with butter.
3. Continue to layer potatoes, flour, salt, and butter until all potatoes are used.
4. Pour hot milk over the layers until they are covered. Cover with foil and bake in a slow oven for 1 hour, or until the potatoes are brown on top and tender throughout. If the potatoes become dry, add more milk.
5. Serve the potatoes directly from the baking dish and sprinkle chopped parsley over the top just before serving.
